title: Resolution adopting Resolution No. 2019-65, dated October 11, 2019 entitled "A Resolution Adopting the New Internal Rules of Procedures of the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños," and Resolution No. 2022-158, dated October 11, 2022 entitled "Resolution Approving the Amendments to the Internal Rules of Procedures of the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños"; Subject to Amendment Updated of the New Sangguniang Bayan Members to Come Out within ninety (90) days as Prescribed by the Local Government Code of 19
